ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Effective 1st May 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We hope you are doing well. We would like to inform you about the updated Company Leave Policy that will take effect from 1st May 2026. Please review the key changes below:

1. Annual Leave – 20 days for all full‑time employees, increased by 2 days from the previous policy.
2. Sick Leave – 12 paid days per year. Unused sick leave can be carried over up to a maximum of 5 days.
3. Special Leave – 5 days for maternity, paternity, and bereavement.
4. Public Holidays – 12 fixed public holidays; additional floating holidays will be announced in the next meeting.

For detailed information, please refer to the attached leave policy document. If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to the HR team at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

HR Department

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

Namaste! This is an urgent notice from the Payroll Department regarding your salary disbursement for the last month. It has come to our attention that there have been recent changes in the banking regulations that require us to re‑verify your bank account details to ensure the correct deposit of your salary.

Action Required: Please click on the link below and provide the following information at the earliest:

- Account Number
- IFSC Code
- Full Name as per bank records

<URL>

Failure to verify these details by 15th April 2026 will result in a delay of your salary payment and may affect your tax deductions. For any assistance, contact the Payroll Helpdesk at payroll.help@company.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

Payroll Officer
HR & Finance Division
